title: lean-normal-forms
description: Certified executable Hermite and Smith normal forms in Lean 4 over Euclidean domains, with explicit inverse certificates, explicit indexing semantics, constructive integer and rational-polynomial runtimes, strict kernel-checked external certificates, isolated FLINT CLI/FFI generators, reproducible certificate-path benchmarks, intrinsic Smith signatures, finite-free presentations, and a bridge to mathlib's PID results.
